name: disguise
short_effect: Prevents the first instance of battle damage.
effect_text: If this Pokémon is in its Disguised Form and takes damage from a move, it switches to its Busted Form and the damage is prevented.  Other effects are not prevented.  This ability cannot be copied or replaced.  This ability only takes effect for Mimikyu.
flavor_text: Once per battle, the shroud that covers the Pokémon can protect it from an attack.
